title: Stira Circuit Breaker Rules
description: Safety constraints that activate when parameters cross thresholds

param.description: Only fixed-core params can trigger breakers

direction.description: Fire when param goes below/above threshold

resetMode.description: auto = self-resolves once value clears threshold +/- hysteresis (typical for warn/notify); manual = stays active until operator clears (recommended for block)

hysteresis.description: Margin around threshold for auto-recovery, prevents flapping. For direction=below: resolved at >= threshold + hysteresis; for direction=above: resolved at <= threshold - hysteresis
